hardware.igpu: Intel UHD Graphics (32 EUs, Tiger Lake i9-11900KB)

shannon_prime.method: VHT2 in-place on USM pointer (zero copy)

notes: VHT2 is negligible (2.3% of compute) - Shannon-Prime compression is essentially free
Q4 matmul is GPU-bound at 0.76ms per [3072×3072] - hardware ceiling for 32 EUs
26-layer estimate assumes linear scaling (realistic for sequential decode)
Real RTF will include encoder time (done on RTX) + token embedding + softmax
Zero-copy validated: same *mut f32 used by CPU (VHT2) and GPU (attention)
